reviews.comment:
Las hamburguesas son asquerosas y encima precocidas y frías. Un asco. Te cobran re caro. Le decís que te la vuelvan a calentar y sigue igual. Un asco.

(Translated by Google)
The burgers are disgusting, and on top of that, they're precooked and cold. Disgusting. They charge you a lot. You ask them to reheat it, and it's still the same. Disgusting.

reviews.comment:
Paramos al mediodía para comer luego de un viaje largo desde Bariloche y luego dirigirnos a Bs.As. Pedimos dos roll y si podían calentarlas porque estaban frías a lo qué nos respondieron que ya estaban calientes, lo volvimos a pedir y la chica hizo un gesto de mala manera como si estuviéramos molestando. Cuando trajeron los roll estaban gomosas por haberlas calentado en el microondas y no en el horno. En otros YPF estaban crujientes. Nada, eso me molesto.
25/11/22

(Translated by Google)
We stopped at midday for lunch after a long trip from Bariloche to Buenos Aires. We ordered two rolls and asked if they could heat them up because they were cold. They told us they were already hot, so we asked again, and the girl made a rude gesture as if we were bothering her. When they brought the rolls, they were rubbery because they had been heated in the microwave instead of the oven. At other YPF stations, they were crispy. That really annoyed me.

11/25/22
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtc2J5YmhnRRAB
